overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from a magical school setting, showing an outdoor classroom beneath a rustic wooden pavilion. Students in dark robes gather around wooden worktables while a professor stands near an ornate door at the back, with sunlit forest and meadows visible through the open sides of the structure.

segments.scene_description: A static view of an outdoor magical classroom beneath a wooden pavilion. Students in dark robes stand scattered around wooden worktables, while a professor observes from near a large ornate door at the back. Sunlight filters through the structure, illuminating the stone floor and the forest meadow visible beyond the open sides of the pavilion.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, immersive view of a magical outdoor classroom nestled within a rustic wooden pavilion. It begins by capturing the quiet atmosphere of the space, where students in dark robes are gathered around heavy wooden worktables. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward the back of the structure where a professor stands watch beside a large, ornate door. The scene then expands to reveal the interplay of light and nature, with sunlight filtering through the pavilion to illuminate the stone floor and the lush forest meadow visible beyond the open sides.
